title: Alarms and cameras
seoDescription: Audited service with alarms and CCTV/IP cameras within the current Instal Berrozpe website.
intro: The current website presents this service as a security offer for home or business.
summary: It is structured around two main blocks: alarms and CCTV/IP cameras.

benefits.title: Key points
items: The current website positions it for home or business.
It relies on a security and remote supervision angle.
Alarms and cameras grouped into one audited page.

process.title: Described process
items: Contact to explain the security need.
Advice on the most suitable solution.
Installation of the alarm or camera system.
Follow-up support mentioned on the current website.

items.question: What does the current website mention inside this service?
items.answer: The audit confirms two blocks: alarms and CCTV/IP cameras.

items.question: Can the camera feed be checked remotely?
items.answer: The current page mentions remote access for IP cameras through the internet.

items.question: Is any receiving center mentioned by name?
items.answer: Yes. The current website mentions TECALSA in the alarms section.

pendingConfirmation: The reference to TECALSA appears on the current website and should be confirmed before being kept.
The current website speaks about constant monitoring and needs validation before it is treated as a closed operational promise.
